title: 3D Ores
description: This is a 3D Ore overhaul pack
body:
```Since Hytale has came out I have love the style they have so I thought, Can Minecraft can have that same look in style? So like any reaonable person would do... I Overhauled all the ores in Minecraft including the ones in the nether! (Anyone would do that right?)```



### _**Plans for the future:**_
```
- All different Ore styles/looks

- Ore shimmer animation
```
